scenarios.name: invoice-line-items-csv
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses extract_tables and csv.writer but conflates header and data rows; treatment splits headers from rows and writes a clean CSV with a header row, exactly as the skill's extract_tables helper does.

scenarios.name: paper-metadata-and-text
scenarios.rationale: Baseline switches to PyPDF2 instead of the skill-recommended pdfplumber; treatment reads pdf.metadata, iterates pdf.pages, and prints text keyed by 1-based page numbers per the skill.
